div.style: width:100%; margin-top:8px; padding-top:6px; border-top:1px solid #333; font-size:9px; color:#333;
div.p: La factura es beneficio de todos, ¡exíjala!

t.t-value: o._name == 'stock.picking'
o.cai if not is_picking else (o.cai or '')
o.numeroInicial if not is_picking else (o.numeroInicial or '')
o.numeroFinal if not is_picking else (o.numeroFinal or '')
o.fechaLimiteEmision if not is_picking else o.fechaLimiteEmision
', '.join([p for p in [company.city or '', company.state_id.name if company.state_id else '', company.country_id.name if company.country_id else ''] if p])
o.invoice_date or o.date
(o.sale_order_id.client_order_ref or '').strip() if o.sale_order_id else ''
o.invoice_user_id or (o.sale_order_id.user_id if o.sale_order_id else False)
(sar_print_labels or {}).get(o.id) or o.sar_print_label

div.style: font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:600; color:#bfdbfe;
font-size:22px; font-weight:700; color:#ffffff; letter-spacing:0.3px; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:8px;

span.style: display:inline-block; background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; margin:0 6px 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

display:inline-block; background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; margin:0 6px 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
display:inline-block; background-color:#22c55e; color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; margin:0 0 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

div.style: font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#6b7280; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:600;

t.t-value: ', '.join([p for p in [company.city or '', company.state_id.name if company.state_id else '', company.country_id.name if company.country_id else ''] if p])

div.style: font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:700;

table.style: width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-bottom:12px; background-color:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

td.style: padding:8px 10px; font-size:10px; width:25%; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid #e5e7eb;
padding:8px 10px; font-size:10px; width:25%; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid #e5e7eb;
padding:8px 10px; font-size:10px; width:25%; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid #e5e7eb;

table.style: width:100%; max-width:520px; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.55; margin-bottom:8px;

td.style: border-left:1px solid #1a4fa0; border-right:1px solid #1a4fa0; border-bottom:1px solid #1a4fa0; padding:5px 8px;
border-left:1px solid #1a4fa0; border-right:1px solid #1a4fa0; border-bottom:1px solid #1a4fa0; padding:5px 8px; background-color:#f7f8fa; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

t.t-value: ', '.join([p for p in [company.city or '', company.state_id.name if company.state_id else '', company.country_id.name if company.country_id else ''] if p])
o.invoice_date or o.date
(o.sale_order_id.client_order_ref or '').strip() if o.sale_order_id else ''
o.invoice_user_id or (o.sale_order_id.user_id if o.sale_order_id else False)

td.style: width:35%; vertical-align:top; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.45; padding-right:8px;
width:35%; vertical-align:top; text-align:right; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.5; padding-left:8px;

div.strong: Original: Cliente — Copia: Obligado Tributario Emisor

div.style: font-size:11px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;

t.t-value: ', '.join([p for p in [company.city or '', company.state_id.name if company.state_id else '', company.country_id.name if company.country_id else ''] if p])
o.invoice_date or o.date
(o.sale_order_id.client_order_ref or '').strip() if o.sale_order_id else ''
o.invoice_user_id or (o.sale_order_id.user_id if o.sale_order_id else False)

td.style: width:35%; vertical-align:top; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.45; padding-right:8px;
width:35%; vertical-align:top; text-align:right; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.5; padding-left:8px;

div.strong: Original: Cliente — Copia: Obligado Tributario Emisor

div.style: font-size:11px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;

td.style: border:1px solid #0c2d5e; padding:6px 8px; background-color:#0c2d5e; color:#fff; font-weight:600; font-size:11px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
border:1px solid #0c2d5e; padding:6px 8px; text-align:right; background-color:#0c2d5e; color:#fff; font-weight:600; font-size:12px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

t.t-value: ', '.join([p for p in [company.city or '', company.state_id.name if company.state_id else '', company.country_id.name if company.country_id else ''] if p])

div.span: La factura es beneficio de todos, ¡exíjala!

div.style: background-color:#f0f5ff; padding:8px 12px; text-align:center; font-size:8.5px; color:#374151; line-height:1.55; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
margin-bottom:4px; white-space:nowrap; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#0c2d5e; letter-spacing:0.6px; font-family:'Courier New',monospace;

span.style: font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; font-family:inherit;

div.div: El no pago de esta factura al vencimiento generará un 3% de recargo mensual

t.t-value: o.partner_id.commercial_partner_id or o.partner_id
o.scheduled_date or o.date_done or o.date

td.style: width:35%; vertical-align:top; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.45; padding-right:8px;
width:35%; vertical-align:top; text-align:right; font-size:10px; color:#111827; line-height:1.5; padding-left:8px;
td.div: Original: Destinatario · Copia 1: Emisor · Copia 2: SAR

div.style: font-size:11px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;

t.t-value: o.partner_id.commercial_partner_id or o.partner_id

div.style: background-color:#f7f8fa; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 12px; min-height:95px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
background-color:#f7f8fa; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 12px; min-height:95px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
font-size:10px; letter-spacing:1px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px; border-bottom:2px solid #1a4fa0; padding-bottom:4px;
font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:600; color:#bfdbfe;
font-size:22px; font-weight:700; color:#ffffff; letter-spacing:0.3px; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:8px;

span.style: display:inline-block; background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; margin:0 6px 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

display:inline-block; background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; margin:0 6px 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
display:inline-block; background-color:#22c55e; color:#ffffff; border-radius:10px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; margin:0 0 4px 0; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

table.style: width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; background-color:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; font-size:10px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;

t.t-value: o.partner_id.commercial_partner_id or o.partner_id

div.style: background-color:#f0f5ff; border:1px solid #c7d7f5; border-radius:6px; padding:12px 14px; min-height:88px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#1a4fa0; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:700;
font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#6b7280; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:600;

table.style: width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; background-color:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;
